caribbean.headline: Heavy Rain and Choppy Seas Near Martinique
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing persistent heavy tropical moisture with 100% rain probability, easterly winds up to 14 kt and seas around 3.0 ft with a SE swell at a 7 s period. I’m monitoring Aruba as a secondary concern where winds reach 22 kt, and I recommend mariners and port operators expect reduced visibility, localized runoff, and brief squalls in Martinique while exercising caution.

mediterranean.headline: Lisbon Rain Threat Amid Light Winds and Small Seas
mediterranean.paragraph: Lisbon is seeing elevated rain potential with 62% rain probability, light southerly winds around 11 kt and waves near 2.6 ft with a 7 s west swell. I expect conditions to remain below Small Craft Advisory thresholds, though Mykonos will register the strongest winds in the basin at about 19 kt.
